text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bearing the burden of countless hopes, Mejiro
Ryan grows stronger each day as she prepares for
the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubting the sheer amount of effort
she's put into ensuring her own victory. Mejiro
Bright, too, has no doubt that Mejiro Ryan will
win the upcoming race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Ines Fujin intends to live up to the hopes of
all those who see their dreams in her. No matter
how formidable her foe, she can't afford to lose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Burning with the desire to live up to her fans'
expectations and dream alongside them, Ines
steps onto the track. The Takarazuka Kinen is
about to begin!
